name: Tofu Provencal Club Sandwich
recipeIngredient: 1 bn Arugula or red leaf lettuce
recipeInstructions:
1. To make marinade, combine olive oil, lemon juice, bouillon, Worcestershire sauce, garlic, herbs and black pepper in a shallow baking dish.
2. Slice tofu lengthwise into four steaks. Add tofu, peppers, and onion to marinade. Set aside for 15 minutes, turning the tofu and vegetables occasionally to coat with marinade.
3. Combine mayonnaise, basil, garlic powder, and black pepper in a blender or food processor and puree until smooth. Refrigerate until serving time.
